The '''Imperial Customs Frigate''' was one of the main [[Frigate/Legends|vessels]] used by the [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs Office's]] patrols.

==Characteristics==
The Imperial Customs [[Frigate/Legends|Frigate]] was manufactured by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]], the builders of the larger [[Imperial Customs Corvette|Light corvette]] also used by the Customs Office. Though it was slower, smaller, and less durable than the Light Corvette or the [[Guardian-class light cruiser|''Guardian''-class light cruiser]] from [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], it required a smaller crew, and its six heavy [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] had significantly greater firepower at short range.

==Role==
Like other vessels used by Imperial Customs, it was able to do battle with most [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]' [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]], the forces of small-time [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], or even [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Of course, it was completely outclassed by [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], which generally required the intervention of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
Sometimes during [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet's]] [[Captain/Legends#Civilian use|captaincy]], the ''[[Dorion Discus]]'' [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] caught the attention of the Customs Frigate [[Assessor (Imperial Customs Frigate)|''Assessor'']]. The ''Discus'' disobeyed the shut down order and tried to escape. After a warning shot, the frigate began to shoot at the freighter, but it entered hyperspace.<ref name="RPG">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']]</ref>

While primarily used by the Empire, the Customs Frigate was also sold to local governments for their own small navies, and at least one vessel, [[Battle of Yavin (starship)|''Battle of Yavin'']], was captured and used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was also coveted by pirates, who captured the vessel or bought illegal copies of the design built in criminal [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]]. One such pirate vessel was the ''[[Counter-Puncher]]'', commanded by [[Tor Skylow]] and crewed by Imperial deserters.<ref name="Pirates & Privateers" />

[[File:Counter-Puncher.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The ''Counter-Puncher'' was a modified Customs Frigate.]]

==Behind the scenes==
The stats of the Imperial Customs Frigate first appeared in the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]].<ref name="RPG" /> Later these stats were given to the [[Guardian-class light cruiser|''Guardian''-class light cruiser]] and the frigate got new ones.<ref name="Pirates & Privateers" />
